title: Better Advancement Info
body:
## 📜 About

AdvancementInfo enhances Minecraft's advancement screen with a detailed information panel that shows exactly what you need to complete each advancement. Never wonder what criteria you're missing again!

**This is an unofficial port of [gbl's AdvancementInfo](https://github.com/gbl/AdvancementInfo) for Minecraft 1.21.11+**

![advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e69f5a9465c7b3ed9184ec2c0f43442b854b716.png)
---

## ✨ Features

### 📊 Detailed Info Panel
- View all advancement criteria in an easy-to-read side panel
- ✅ Completed criteria shown in **green**
- ❌ Incomplete criteria shown in **red**
- Click any advancement to pin its details for reference
- Scroll through long criteria lists with mouse wheel

### 🔍 Search Functionality
- Quickly find advancements by name or description
- Perfect for large modpacks with hundreds of advancements
- Press Enter to filter, Escape to clear

### 🎨 Fully Customizable
- Adjust info panel width (min/max/percentage)
- Configure screen margins
- Customize completed/incomplete colors
- All settings accessible through Cloth Config

### 📐 Adaptive Layout
- Works on any screen size or resolution
- Supports fullscreen and windowed modes
- Automatic layout adjustment for readability

---

## 📦 Requirements

**Required:**
- Minecraft **1.21.11**
- Fabric Loader **0.18.4+**
- Fabric API **0.140.2+1.21.11** or newer

**Recommended:**
- Cloth Config API **21.11.153+** (for in-game configuration)
- Mod Menu (for easy access to config screen)

---

## 🎮 How to Use

1. Press **L** to open the advancements screen
2. **Hover** over any advancement to see its criteria in the info panel
3. **Click** an advancement to pin its information
4. Use the **search box** at the top to filter advancements
5. **Scroll** with mouse wheel to view long criteria lists
6. **Drag** the advancement tree to navigate

---

## 🖼️ Perfect For

- **Large Modpacks**: Handles advancement packs like BlazeandCave's Advancements with ease
- **Achievement Hunters**: Track exactly what you need for 100% completion
- **Content Creators**: Clean, readable interface perfect for streaming
- **Custom Maps**: Works great with adventure maps and custom advancement packs

---

## 🙏 Credits

### Original Author: **gbl**
All credit for the concept, design, and original implementation goes to **[gbl](https://github.com/gbl)**. This mod would not exist without their incredible work on the [original AdvancementInfo](https://github.com/gbl/AdvancementInfo).

Thank you gbl for creating this amazing mod and making it open source! 💚

### 1.21.11+ Port: **ultimategamermc**
- Updated mixins for Minecraft 1.21.11's new rendering API (DrawContext)
- Fixed advancement tree panning and scrolling issues
- Modernized dependencies and build configuration
- Ongoing maintenance and updates

### Special Thanks
- **Fabric Team** - For the modding framework
- **shedaniel** - For Cloth Config API
- **Minecraft Modding Community** - For documentation and support

---

## ⚠️ Known Issues

- This is a community port, not the official version
- Some advanced features may need further testing
- Report any bugs on the [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/rajeshjaga/Advancement-Info/issues) page

---

## 🔗 Links

- **Source Code**: [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/rajeshjaga/Advancement-Info)- **Original Mod**: [gbl's AdvancementInfo](https://github.com/gbl/AdvancementInfo)
- **Issues**: [Report Bugs](https://github.com/rajeshjaga/Advancement-Info/issues)
- **Support**: [Discussions](https://github.com/rajeshjaga/Advancement-Info/discussions)

---

ie. MIT License

---

If you enjoy this mod, please visit [gbl's original repository](https://github.com/gbl/AdvancementInfo) and give it a ⭐ star! Show appreciation for the creator of this wonderful mod.
